SEARCH
パッケージ org.unlaxer.infra.syslenz4j

クラス JsonExporter

java.lang.Object
org.unlaxer.infra.syslenz4j.JsonExporter
public class JsonExporter extends Object
Converts collected metrics into the syslenz ProcEntry JSON format.

Output example: 


 {
   "source": "jvm/pid-12345",
   "fields": [
     {"name": "heap_used", "value": {"Bytes": 524288000}, "unit": null, "description": "Current heap memory usage"},
     ...
   ]
 }

No external JSON library is used; output is built via simple string concatenation. This keeps the library dependency-free.

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    static String
    export(List<JvmCollector.Metric> jvmMetrics)
    Export only JVM metrics (convenience overload).
    static String
    export(List<JvmCollector.Metric> jvmMetrics, List<JvmCollector.Metric> customMetrics)
    Export JVM metrics and custom metrics as a ProcEntry JSON string.

    クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

  • メソッドの詳細

    • export

      public static String export(List<JvmCollector.Metric> jvmMetrics, List<JvmCollector.Metric> customMetrics)
      Export JVM metrics and custom metrics as a ProcEntry JSON string.
      パラメータ:
      jvmMetrics - metrics from JvmCollector
      customMetrics - metrics from MetricRegistry
      戻り値:
      a JSON string in ProcEntry format

    • export

      public static String export(List<JvmCollector.Metric> jvmMetrics)
      Export only JVM metrics (convenience overload).
